title: ai.json Configuration
description: Configuration file for aix - unified AI agent and editor configuration

$schema.description: URL to JSON Schema for validation

anyOf.description: Single config to extend (npm package or local path)
Array of configs to extend (resolved in order)
Shorthand: version range or local path

path.description: Subdirectory within repo
Local file or directory path

anyOf.description: Reference to a skill, config, or resource
Shorthand: version range or local path

path.description: Subdirectory within repo
Local file or directory path

source.description: Where to load the skill from

anyOf.description: Skill reference (Agent Skills spec compliant)

skills.description: Map of skill names to their configurations (or false to disable)

anyOf.description: Allowed tool names
Allowed resource patterns (glob)

additionalProperties.description: Environment variable value. Use ${VAR_NAME} for dynamic resolution.

anyOf.description: Allowed tool names
Allowed resource patterns (glob)

additionalProperties.description: Environment variable value. Use ${VAR_NAME} for dynamic resolution.

mcp.description: Map of MCP server names to configurations (or false to disable)

anyOf.description: Source reference: local path (./, ../, /, file:), git URL (https://), or git shorthand (github:)

description.description: When the rule should apply (required for auto mode)

activation.description: When the rule should be activated

path.description: Local file path to rule content

url.description: Git repository URL or shorthand (e.g., github:user/repo)

path.description: Path to rule file within repo (default: root)
Path to file within package (e.g., "rules/style.md")

version.description: Version to auto-install (omit to use project node_modules)

anyOf.description: Rule with metadata and content source

rules.description: Map of rule names to their definitions (or false to disable)

prompts.description: Map of prompt names to their definitions (or false to disable)

version.description: Version to auto-install (omit to use project node_modules)

anyOf.description: Rule with metadata and content source

rules.description: Editor-specific rules (in addition to global rules)

matcher.description: Pattern to match (regex or pipe-separated literal, editor-specific).

sequential.description: Run hooks in this group sequentially instead of in parallel (Gemini).

shell.description: Shell selector when only one of `command` / `bash` / `powershell` is set.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. Adapters convert to native units (e.g. milliseconds).

show_output.description: Whether to surface command output in the editor UI (Windsurf-specific).

working_directory.description: Working directory for the command. Interchangeable with `cwd`; the strategy decides which native key to emit (Windsurf uses `working_directory`; Copilot, Gemini, and Claude Code use `cwd`).

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Interchangeable with `working_directory`.

env.description: Environment variables to set when running the command.

async.description: Run the command in the background without blocking the agent.

async_rewake.description: Run async; on exit code 2, wake the agent with stderr/stdout context.

status_message.description: Custom spinner message while the hook runs (Claude Code).

once.description: Run once per session, then unregister (Claude Code skill / agent frontmatter).

url.description: URL to POST hook input to (Claude Code HTTP).

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers, with env-var interpolation (Claude Code HTTP).

allowed_env_vars.description: Env-var allowlist for header interpolation (Claude Code HTTP).

mcp_server.description: Configured MCP server name (Claude Code mcp_tool).

mcp_tool.description: Tool name on the MCP server (Claude Code mcp_tool).

mcp_input.description: Arguments for the MCP tool, with `${tool_input.x}` substitution (Claude Code).

model.description: Model override for prompt / agent hooks.

name.description: Friendly identifier for logs and CLI commands.

fail_closed.description: Block the action when the hook itself fails (Cursor).

loop_limit.description: Max auto-triggered follow-ups for stop-style events (Cursor).

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks for AI agent events

maxBackups.description: Maximum number of backup files to keep per file

maxBackupAgeDays.description: Delete backups older than this many days

maxCacheAgeDays.description: Delete git-sourced cache entries older than this many days
